data.body:
[8/6(Tue) Ban Notice – Grand Assault]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault.

The following players have been banned, and their rankings have been deleted for exploiting and abusing the in-game system under our service policies.

- Total number of players banned: 127
- Period of Restriction: Permanent (Removed from the leaderboard)
- Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3079688

#BlueArchive

![GxkJGtUaUAA6zip.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/443/vHRnTYcBWsUoMWrV1iqI0gTh9fl3aPb9.jpg)
